calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-229 drive-coupling disambiguator (overshoot + OFF floor + recalibrated argmax-relevance readiness)
items.note: Pre-registered disambiguator routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-514q_2026-06-16 (confirmed). 514q C_WL_DRIVE delta=0.0 exact (WL_drive==WL_nodrive); the readiness gate green-lit a vacuous comparison (spread>1e-3, not argmax-relevant) and ran no overshoot control. 514r adds (i) overshoot most_wanted under artificially large per-axis drive -- overshoot_flip>=0.6 on >=2/3 seeds => drive CAN carve at adequate magnitude => 514q FAIL is env/magnitude artifact (non_contributory, substrate_ceiling, /implement-substrate amend SD-049-PHASE-2 differential-depletion), NOT a weakens; overshoot CANNOT flip => genuine MECH-229 drive-coupling weakens; (ii) OFF/bank-disabled wanting==liking floor sanity; (iii) recalibrated readiness = argmax-relevance positive control (overshoot must flip a realistic base_value gap, natural must not). claim_ids=[MECH-229] sub-leg (b) drive-modulated wanting ONLY; sub-leg (a) wanting!=liking established by 514o PASS and NOT under test (must not weaken (a)). Supports path retained (natural delta>=effect_margin). All readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue, never a false weakens. validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end.

items.title: ARC-065 GAP-A committed-action diversity falsifier on the TOP-K shortlist conversion substrate (3-arm matched-entropy + in-arm route-range gate; supersedes 569h)
items.note: GAP-A conversion falsifier on the TOP-K shortlist substrate (landed ree-v3 dafc76a; new E3Config modulatory_shortlist_mode=top_k + modulatory_shortlist_k=3). Routed by the active failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-569h + critical_path_synthesis Path 2. 569h FAILED C_R1B 1/3 on the additive ARM_STD_G2 lever AND the 684 MARGIN shortlist converted 0/3 (entropy 0.337 < proposer 0.549) because the margin admitted a near-whole state-stable set (modulatory_shortlist_size_mean 6.25-8.54) -> argmin collapsed to the channel global favourite. top_k shortlists the k F-best by primary score so the small eligible set's MEMBERSHIP ROTATES with state and the within-set argmin of the routed channel converts the per-candidate range into committed diversity (deterministic within-set rule -> entropy reflects channel STRUCTURE not sampling noise -> beats matched-noise). Same 3-arm single-variable matched-entropy design as 569h (ARM_0_PROPOSER / ARM_1_E2WF_TOPK under test / ARM_2_MATCHED_NOISE T=2.5 negative control); top-k conversion config ON all arms (use_modulatory_shortlist_then_modulate + mode=top_k + k=3 + use_modulatory_channel_routing + source=cand_world_summary + use_modulatory_selection_authority gain=2.0 std-basis); candidate_summary_source swept. READINESS gates: in-arm route_range > 0.01 + e2-divergence cand_world_pairwise_dist > 0.03 (both >=2/3, RANGE statistics). C_R1B PRIMARY: ARM_1 selected_action_class_entropy strict-above BOTH ARM_2 and ARM_0 per seed (>=2/3) AND mean > 0.3. Records modulatory_shortlist_size_mean per arm (top_k must show ~3, the autopsy discriminator vs 684 margin 6.25-8.54). Pre-registered off-ramp: readiness met + no C_R1B lift -> conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_routing (non_contributory, NOT an ARC-065 falsification -> deeper /implement-substrate or /claim-synthesis); route/e2-divergence below floor -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. NO weakens path. claim_ids=[ARC-065] only; MECH-341/ARC-062/MECH-309/MECH-294 untouched; ARC-065 stays provisional/substrate_ceiling. SP-CEM + SD-056 rollout-norm clamp on. Dry-run smoke PASS (3 arms end-to-end, top_k_shortlist_engaged=True, self-routes substrate_not_ready at dry scale by design). experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance bridge EVIDENCE re-run on the STABILIZED base harm landscape (5-arm continuous-survival; supersedes 603o)
items.note: Corrected SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance-bridge EVIDENCE re-run on the now-stabilized base harm landscape (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-603p Branch B). 603o self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue because the base harm landscape was seed-fragile (1/3 seeds). The 2026-06-16 scaffolded_sd054_onboarding harm-pathway STABILIZATION amend (scaffold_harm_pathway_encoder_lr=3e-4 + scaffold_harm_pathway_warmup_steps=250, in ALL 5 arms base config, NOT a global LR raise) now clears harm_eval_range>=0.02 on 3/3 seeds at proximity_harm=0.10 (in-session proof-of-fix validation at reduced budget: ranges [0.0245,0.0541,0.0278], corr 0.70-0.85; seeds 43+44 flipped FAIL->PASS vs 603p). 5-arm continuous-mean-survival primary; the base-harm-landscape harm_eval_range>=0.02 on >=2/3 seeds is RETAINED as the FIRST self-routing non-vacuity precondition (self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at full scale if under-powered, never a false bridge verdict). claim_ids=[SD-059, MECH-358]; evidence; supersedes 603o. behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-C.
